Wright, Simply Scheme: Introducing Computer Science , 2nd ed., Cambridge, MA: MIT Press, 1999. B. K. Harvey, Computer Science Logo Style , 2 ed., Vol. 1-3, Cambridge, MA: MIT Press, 1997. B. Harvey and M. Wright, Simply Scheme: Introducing Computer Science , Cambridge, MA: MIT Press, 1994. B. Harvey, Computer Science Logo Style Volume 3: Advanced Topics , Cambridge, MA: MIT Press, 1987. B. Harvey, Computer Science Logo Style Volume 2: Projects, Styles, and Techniques , Cambridge, MA: MIT Press, 1986. C. Solomon, M. Minsky, and B. Harvey, Eds., LogoWorks: Challenging Programs in Logo , Byte Books, New York: McGraw-Hill, 1986. B. Harvey, Computer Science Logo Style Volume 1: Intermediate Programming , Cambridge, MA: MIT Press, 1985. Articles in conference proceedings A. Rasmussen, M. Johnson, R. Liao, R. Sridharan, D. Garcia, and B. K. Harvey, " Infusing parallelism into introductory computer science using MapReduce (Poster) ," in Proc. 39th ACM Technical Symp. on Computer Science Education (SIGCSE '08) , New York, NY: The Association for Computing Machinery, Inc., 2008, pp. 2 pg. Technical Reports M. Johnson, R. H. Liao, A. Rasmussen, R. Sridharan, D. Garcia, and B. K. Harvey, " Infusing Parallelism into Introductory Computer Science Curriculum using MapReduce ," EECS Department, University of California, Berkeley, Tech. Rep. UCB/EECS-2008-34, April 2008.
